prompt: Write a dry one-paragraph Amazon review of the experience of waking up.
response: Waking up is an overrated daily ritual requiring no skill, with inconsistent performance across all models—early units are particularly notorious for abrupt starts and poor lighting calibration. The experience lacks meaningful customization, often presenting a dim, uninviting environment with no clear objective beyond mild disorientation. Customer support (i.e., coffee) is essential but delayed by 15–30 minutes post-wake. No significant improvements have been observed over centuries of use, and compatibility with productivity remains dubious. Not recommended for those seeking a smooth, efficient start. One star, would sleep through it if allowed.
